Interface IRasterFunctionTemplate2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster template function.

[Guid("E312D8AF-1B60-482B-AE13-B8E111CFC894")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterFunctionTemplate2 : IRasterFunctionTemplate
